expected_goal: Immediately understand Chravel as useful for Youth soccer team mom
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Landing observed with “The Group Chat Travel App,” use-case cards, pricing, and login/signup CTA.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Tanya Brooks understands the anti-fragmentation premise quickly.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Youth soccer team mom needs more specific proof than broad group-trip copy.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Add/use-case deepen Youth soccer team mom proof points and mode-specific CTAs.

expected_goal: Start without losing momentum or being forced through irrelevant setup
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Auth modal observed with Google, Apple, email/password, forgot password, and close control; onboarding is skippable in code.
positive_reaction: Clear product intent and enough primitives to test the job.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Account creation before invitee value is a major adoption risk for 24-person groups.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Show value/preview before account commitment and keep skip controls prominent.

expected_goal: Create the right Regular Trips workspace with dates, location, and context
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: CreateTripModal supports Group, Pro, and Event with required title/dates/timezone and gated Pro/Event logic.
positive_reaction: Clear product intent and enough primitives to test the job.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Regular trip is likely enough, but mode naming may be unclear.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Clarify why Regular Trips is the right starting mode and avoid setup-before-value.

expected_goal: Invite the group and let invitees see value before account friction
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Join routes show pre-auth preview and typed error states; browser demo surfaced Invite/Share buttons on trip cards.
positive_reaction: Clear product intent and enough primitives to test the job.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] 24-person group adoption can fail if invitees must create accounts before seeing itinerary value.
bug_ux_issue: consumer_guest has no resource access, so account-light guest value is constrained.
recommended_fix: Add account-light read-only itinerary preview and conditional approval copy.

expected_goal: Move trip-specific chatter away from generic group chat
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: TripTabs includes Chat; Stream chat and Pro role/broadcast concepts exist in source.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Trip-specific chat is useful once structured objects also live there.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Users may keep iMessage/WhatsApp unless invite conversion is excellent.
bug_ux_issue: Chat alone does not beat existing group chat.
recommended_fix: Use chat as context around itinerary decisions, not as the main replacement claim.

expected_goal: Create and read a shared schedule under change pressure
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: TripTabs includes Calendar; marketing/demo screenshots showed shared calendar/itinerary concepts.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Calendar is a strong fit for parents miss updates.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Schedule changes need push/broadcast confidence, not just editable events.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Surface itinerary overview, local timezone, change history, and export/share affordances.

expected_goal: Save lodging, venues, restaurants, and map context in one place
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Places/Basecamp is a core tab; source supports Basecamp and Explore patterns.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Saved places reduce Maps/Yelp/DM scatter.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Must beat Google Maps saved lists.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Support per-leg/per-date basecamps and richer saved-link context.

expected_goal: Turn group decisions into visible outcomes
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Polls are a core tab and marketing/demo screenshots show voting UI.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Decision clarity is one of the most universally understandable wins.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Polls only replace chat votes if results lead to a clear next action.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Add “turn winner into calendar/place/task” next-step CTA.

expected_goal: Assign responsibilities with due dates and completion clarity
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Tasks are a core tab; source supports task surfaces.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Useful for Weekend tournament parent organizer when responsibility is visible.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Can feel overkill for casual participants.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Add role/bulk assignment and lighter checklist templates.

expected_goal: Paste or upload existing confirmations/schedules into structured trip data
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Smart Import pipeline exists; current code includes one free import taste before paywall.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Import is the clearest “magic moment” for artifacts already living elsewhere.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Duplicate/accuracy errors would be trust-breaking because imported data looks authoritative.
bug_ux_issue: Prior research flags idempotency/duplicate-risk gaps; should be validated with real artifacts.
recommended_fix: Make preview/cherry-pick and duplicate detection highly visible; preserve one free taste.

expected_goal: Get trip-aware help without losing trust or control
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: AI query limits are code-aligned at Free 3, Explorer 25, paid unlimited; voice path is dictation-only.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Trip-aware suggestions are compelling when they create structured actions.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Free 3-query limit can interrupt evaluation before habit forms.
bug_ux_issue: Voice concierge entitlement overpromises relative to dictation-only path.
recommended_fix: Label voice honestly, show source/confirmation, and expose usage meter/upgrade at natural moments.

expected_goal: Track shared costs or reimbursements without creating money mistakes
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Payments surface exists for expenses/splits; no in-app money movement; settlement risk noted in prior code-grounded docs.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Ledger visibility can reduce organizer burden.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Must be more trustworthy than Venmo/Splitwise.
bug_ux_issue: Money errors are severe; prior docs flag settlement atomicity/idempotency risk.
recommended_fix: Add deposit tracker, clear Venmo/Cash App handoff, and idempotent settlement.

expected_goal: Collect trip photos/files if it beats existing albums
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Media hub exists; demo/marketing shows photo/video grid.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Useful as retention if it complements the itinerary.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Storage/privacy limits must be understandable.
bug_ux_issue: Prior docs flag advisory storage quota / signed URL concerns.
recommended_fix: Frame media as trip-context album; make storage ownership and privacy explicit.

expected_goal: Control noise, privacy, sharing, and trip-level alerts
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Notification/settings surfaces exist in source; browser console showed PostHog/CSP noise during local walkthrough.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Granular controls would increase trust.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] No per-trip mute/batching would drive notification opt-out.
bug_ux_issue: No per-trip mute/batching is a recurring observed gap in product docs.
recommended_fix: Add per-trip/channel mute, digest batching, privacy summary, and role visibility controls.

expected_goal: Keep guests/members clear without overcomplication
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Permission matrix distinguishes members/guests/pro roles; consumer_guest has no resource access.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Simpler member/guest roles reduce confusion for small groups.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Guest role gives too little pre-signup value.
bug_ux_issue: Guest pre-value is constrained.
evidence_label: [OBSERVED — src/pages/JoinTrip.tsx; src/components/invite/InviteModal.tsx; src/types/inviteErrors.ts; src/types/permissionMatrix.generated.ts]; [OBSERVED — src/components/pro/ProTabsConfig.tsx; src/utils/tripConverter.ts; src/types/proCategories.ts]
recommended_fix: Add safe read-only guest preview.

expected_goal: Meet a relevant paid offer at a natural value moment
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Pricing observed on landing with Free/Explorer/Frequent Chraveler and Trip Pass/Pro CTAs; Pro remains mailto-oriented in source.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Trip Pass is a plausible model for this persona.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Worst CTA: paywall before group is committed.
bug_ux_issue: Trip Pass must appear at the in-product limit moment, not only marketing.
recommended_fix: Offer Trip Pass at the moment per-trip mute + broadcast read receipts creates value, with clear limits and no bait-and-switch.

what_happened: Pricing observed on landing with Free/Explorer/Frequent Chraveler and Trip Pass/Pro CTAs; Pro remains mailto-oriented in source.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Event pass is a plausible model for this persona.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Worst CTA: paywall before group is committed.
bug_ux_issue: Trip Pass must appear at the in-product limit moment, not only marketing.
recommended_fix: Offer Event pass at the moment account-light guest view creates value, with clear limits and no bait-and-switch.

expected_goal: Immediately understand Chravel as useful for College spring break group planner
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Landing observed with “The Group Chat Travel App,” use-case cards, pricing, and login/signup CTA.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Jordan Miller understands the anti-fragmentation premise quickly.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] College spring break group planner needs more specific proof than broad group-trip copy.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Add/use-case deepen College spring break group planner proof points and mode-specific CTAs.

expected_goal: Start without losing momentum or being forced through irrelevant setup
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Auth modal observed with Google, Apple, email/password, forgot password, and close control; onboarding is skippable in code.
positive_reaction: Clear product intent and enough primitives to test the job.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Account creation before invitee value is a major adoption risk for 14-person groups.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Show value/preview before account commitment and keep skip controls prominent.

expected_goal: Create the right Regular Trips workspace with dates, location, and context
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: CreateTripModal supports Group, Pro, and Event with required title/dates/timezone and gated Pro/Event logic.
positive_reaction: Clear product intent and enough primitives to test the job.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Regular trip is likely enough, but mode naming may be unclear.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Clarify why Regular Trips is the right starting mode and avoid setup-before-value.

expected_goal: Invite the group and let invitees see value before account friction
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Join routes show pre-auth preview and typed error states; browser demo surfaced Invite/Share buttons on trip cards.
positive_reaction: Clear product intent and enough primitives to test the job.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] 14-person group adoption can fail if invitees must create accounts before seeing itinerary value.
bug_ux_issue: consumer_guest has no resource access, so account-light guest value is constrained.
recommended_fix: Add account-light read-only itinerary preview and conditional approval copy.

expected_goal: Move trip-specific chatter away from generic group chat
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: TripTabs includes Chat; Stream chat and Pro role/broadcast concepts exist in source.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Trip-specific chat is useful once structured objects also live there.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Users may keep iMessage/WhatsApp unless invite conversion is excellent.
bug_ux_issue: Chat alone does not beat existing group chat.
recommended_fix: Use chat as context around itinerary decisions, not as the main replacement claim.

expected_goal: Create and read a shared schedule under change pressure
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: TripTabs includes Calendar; marketing/demo screenshots showed shared calendar/itinerary concepts.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Calendar is a strong fit for people flake and do not pay.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Schedule changes need push/broadcast confidence, not just editable events.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Surface itinerary overview, local timezone, change history, and export/share affordances.

expected_goal: Save lodging, venues, restaurants, and map context in one place
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Places/Basecamp is a core tab; source supports Basecamp and Explore patterns.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Saved places reduce Maps/Yelp/DM scatter.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Must beat Google Maps saved lists.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Support per-leg/per-date basecamps and richer saved-link context.

expected_goal: Turn group decisions into visible outcomes
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Polls are a core tab and marketing/demo screenshots show voting UI.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Decision clarity is one of the most universally understandable wins.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Polls only replace chat votes if results lead to a clear next action.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Add “turn winner into calendar/place/task” next-step CTA.

expected_goal: Assign responsibilities with due dates and completion clarity
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Tasks are a core tab; source supports task surfaces.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Useful for Spring break group lead when responsibility is visible.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Can feel overkill for casual participants.
bug_ux_issue: None observed in direct browser pass; source/audit gaps noted where applicable.
recommended_fix: Add role/bulk assignment and lighter checklist templates.

expected_goal: Paste or upload existing confirmations/schedules into structured trip data
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Smart Import pipeline exists; current code includes one free import taste before paywall.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Import is the clearest “magic moment” for artifacts already living elsewhere.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Duplicate/accuracy errors would be trust-breaking because imported data looks authoritative.
bug_ux_issue: Prior research flags idempotency/duplicate-risk gaps; should be validated with real artifacts.
recommended_fix: Make preview/cherry-pick and duplicate detection highly visible; preserve one free taste.

expected_goal: Get trip-aware help without losing trust or control
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: AI query limits are code-aligned at Free 3, Explorer 25, paid unlimited; voice path is dictation-only.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Trip-aware suggestions are compelling when they create structured actions.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Free 3-query limit can interrupt evaluation before habit forms.
bug_ux_issue: Voice concierge entitlement overpromises relative to dictation-only path.
recommended_fix: Label voice honestly, show source/confirmation, and expose usage meter/upgrade at natural moments.

expected_goal: Track shared costs or reimbursements without creating money mistakes
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Payments surface exists for expenses/splits; no in-app money movement; settlement risk noted in prior code-grounded docs.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Payment tracking may still reduce awkward reminders.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Must be more trustworthy than Venmo/Splitwise.
bug_ux_issue: Money errors are severe; prior docs flag settlement atomicity/idempotency risk.
recommended_fix: Add deposit tracker, clear Venmo/Cash App handoff, and idempotent settlement.

expected_goal: Collect trip photos/files if it beats existing albums
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Media hub exists; demo/marketing shows photo/video grid.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Useful as retention if it complements the itinerary.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Storage/privacy limits must be understandable.
bug_ux_issue: Prior docs flag advisory storage quota / signed URL concerns.
recommended_fix: Frame media as trip-context album; make storage ownership and privacy explicit.

expected_goal: Control noise, privacy, sharing, and trip-level alerts
tried: Scenario walked through against live landing/demo where available and current source paths.
what_happened: Notification/settings surfaces exist in source; browser console showed PostHog/CSP noise during local walkthrough.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Granular controls would increase trust.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Defaults matter because invitees will not configure settings.
bug_ux_issue: No per-trip mute/batching is a recurring observed gap in product docs.
recommended_fix: Add per-trip/channel mute, digest batching, privacy summary, and role visibility controls.

expected_goal: Keep guests/members clear without overcomplication

what_happened: Permission matrix distinguishes members/guests/pro roles; consumer_guest has no resource access.
positive_reaction: [SIMULATED RISK] Simpler member/guest roles reduce confusion for small groups.
friction: [SIMULATED RISK] Guest role gives too little pre-signup value.
bug_ux_issue: Guest pre-value is constrained.
